rulings.Calendar Matter: Will Contestants Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings To Petitioner Anthony Signorinis Petition For Probate Of Decedents March 10, 2007 Will
rulings.Rulings: The Demurrer and Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings are continued to May 12, 2011 at 2:00 p.m. to be heard after the hearing on the Motion to Set Aside Judgment of Dissolution pending in Family Court Case Number FDI-0770278 currently set for April 28, 2011. If any party opposes this tentative ruling they must notify the Probate Courtroom Clerk at 514-551-3702 and opposing counsel before 4:00 p.m. on Wednesday, March 2, 2011.
